def get_pairs(item_name, item_color):
    pairs = []
    for item in sorted(enumerate(item_name.split())):

Answer: Here is the solution:
```python
import re
def list_items_with_same_color(item_name):
    items = []
    for item in re.finditer(r'\b\w+\b', item_name):
        if item.group(1) == item.group(2):
            items.append(item)
    return items
items = list_items_with_same_color('item-alpha-00')
print(items)
```
